case_title: GOLDMAN, RONALD P. AKA THE GOLDMAN LAW FIRM vs. BAKER, M. LEE, D.D.S. et al

docket_entries.description: SET FOR STATUS CONFERENCE HEARING SET FOR JUL-30-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212 BY THE COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDMAN, RONALD P. AKA THE GOLDMAN LAW FIRM SERVED NOV-10-1998, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, M. LEE, D.D.S.

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-07-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-07-1999, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLF'S ATTY GOLDMAN RONALD P, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-22-1999 CONTINUED FROM APR-07-1999 TO MAY-26-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDMAN, RONALD P. AKA THE GOLDMAN LAW FIRM AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, M. LEE, D.D.S. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-26-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-28-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-08-1999

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-30-1999, CONTINUED TO SEP-17-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212 PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY RONALD GOLDMAN TO FILE BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-17-1999, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED ON 8-30-99.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-26-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY RONALD P GOLDMAN HEARING SET FOR APR-07-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON 4-9-99 ARE VACATED PURSUANT TO CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM PLTF'S ATTY.
CORRESPONDENCE RE: SANCTIONS RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDMAN, RONALD P. AKA THE GOLDMAN LAW FIRM
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-26-1999, OFF CALENDAR
